explanations.pt-br: Dois modelos no browser: embedder (busca) + generator (LLM). Zero servidor.
explanations.en-us: Two models in the browser: embedder (search) + generator (LLM). Zero server.

explanations.pt-br: INGEST: documentos embeddados e armazenados em array simples — vector DB in-memory.
explanations.en-us: INGEST: documents embedded and stored in a simple array — in-memory vector DB.

explanations.pt-br: RETRIEVE + AUGMENT: busca vetorial + monta prompt com contexto.
explanations.en-us: RETRIEVE + AUGMENT: vector search + builds prompt with context.

explanations.pt-br: GENERATE: LLM-3.2-1B roda no browser via ONNX Runtime Web. Resposta fundamentada.
explanations.en-us: GENERATE: Llama-3.2-1B runs in browser via ONNX Runtime Web. Grounded answer.

explanations.pt-br: Pipeline completo: indexar → perguntar → resposta com fontes. Tudo no browser.
explanations.en-us: Complete pipeline: index → ask → answer with sources. Everything in the browser.
